caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Intensify
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing a 94% rain probability with winds reaching 14 kt and wave heights of 5.9 ft, while San Juan has a less than 10% rain probability with winds of 17 kt. The strong winds and significant wave heights in these areas will impact maritime activities, particularly in the Lesser Antilles and Eastern Caribbean regions, including ports such as Barbados and San Juan.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Dubrovnik
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds reaching 18 kt and wave heights of 6.0 ft, while Mykonos is seeing winds of 20 kt. I expect these conditions to impact port operations, with Dubrovnik being the most affected due to the high rain probability and rough seas.
